sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_concat (id UInt32, value1 String, value2 String);
INSERT INTO test_concat (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 'Hello', 'World');
UPDATE test_concat SET value1 = concatWithSeparator(' ', value1, value2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, concatWithSeparator('-', value1, value2) AS concatenated_value FROM test_concat;
